ORDER ON CALIFORNIA PACIFIC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY FROM PLAINTIFF AND FOR SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITAL, MTN TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY FROM PLTF IS GRANTED. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT ANY OBJECTIONS AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 5, 2014. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AGAINST PLAINTIFF JANE VILTMAN AND WILLIAM WEBB OF THE WEBB LEGAL GROUP IN THE AMOUNT OF $1480. AND TO BE MADE PAYABLE TO SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS AND ATTORNEYS DAVIDOVITZ & BENNETT NO LATER THAN AUGUST 29, 2014. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.
